note: Rich terminal rendering validation — 10 breaks (5 categories x 2) + 10 controls (5 hold-out files x 2).

fixtures.name: control_console_capture
fixtures.rationale: Capture context manager __init__/__enter__/__exit__/get — canonical rich Console capture idiom

fixtures.name: control_console_init
fixtures.rationale: Console.__init__ signature with color_system, force_terminal, theme params — canonical rich Console construction

fixtures.name: control_table_add_column_body
fixtures.rationale: Table.add_column Column construction body — canonical rich Table.add_column idiom

fixtures.name: control_table_rich_console
fixtures.rationale: Table.__rich_console__ start through render_annotation — canonical rich renderable protocol

fixtures.name: control_live_enter_exit
fixtures.rationale: Live.__enter__/__exit__/_enable_redirect_io — canonical rich Live context manager usage

fixtures.name: control_live_renderable
fixtures.rationale: Live.renderable property with alt-screen + live stack logic — canonical rich Live display

fixtures.name: control_text_init
fixtures.rationale: Text.__init__ with style/justify/overflow/spans params — canonical rich Text construction

fixtures.name: control_text_styled
fixtures.rationale: Text.styled classmethod — canonical rich Text.stylize usage

fixtures.name: control_panel_init_body
fixtures.rationale: Panel.__init__ body assignments (renderable, box, title, border_style) — canonical rich Panel construction

fixtures.name: control_panel_rich_console
fixtures.rationale: Panel.__rich_console__ start with Padding.unpack, border_style, box.substitute — canonical rich Panel rendering
